repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
full_text_tesim: All single folios (except f. 81v) have stubs as their conjoins
Consecutive pencil foliation in large numbers at center top, followed here; parchment ff. 50-81 also carry small numbers in upper right (not followed)
Ff. 50 to 81 are parchment and palimpsest, the rest are paper
Spine is leather on fabric. Fraying; front and back covers missing.
